items.title: First Draft Fast: operating discovery
items.name: First Draft Fast: operating discovery
items.summary: Discovery is testing whether faster AI-assisted drafting changes the share of design work that starts in-product and remains reviewable.
items.opportunity: Clarify how much technical fidelity is required before faster first drafts create repeat team behavior.

linkedInitiatives.description: First Draft Fast exists to make a credible technical diagram appear quickly enough that more engineers begin design work inside the product.

riskFocus.question: Will technical users trust AI-assisted first drafts enough to keep them?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Users will keep the generated draft as the review base when the output is structurally credible and editable.
evidenceToCollect: How often generated drafts survive first review.

plannedActivities: Compare prompt-driven starts versus blank-canvas starts.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to invest next in model quality, template grounding, or editing guidance.
